title: Commons v1 vs v2 feature parity analysis

log.context: Commons v1 vs v2 feature parity analysis

I have enough to compile the full parity analysis. Here it is:

---

**v1 features present in v2:**

- Player movement (Arrow/WASD, 1.8 px/frame, diagonal normalized)
- Hop (Spacebar, 12-frame sine arc, broadcast)
- Facing left/right from horizontal velocity
- Tile collision (water, building, tree, rock, fountain all blocking)
- Chunk crossing: exit canvas bounds → load adjacent chunk, teleport to opposite edge
- Player name from `/api/me`; fallback adj-animal random name
